# Dynamicsheartesting

**Summary**: A method to measure the mechanical properties of a material under oscillatory stress.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-mohamed|MOHAMED, 2014]] applied dynamic_shear_testing to evaluate the elastic modulus (G') and cross-linking kinetics.
